name: Legends & Legacies: A Story of a Community
original_name: Legends & Legacies: A Story of a Community
overview: Legends & Legacies: A Story of a Community is an eight-part documentary series that explores the rich history and lasting impact of the South African Jewish community. Hosted by Alan Swerdlow, the series traces the journey of Jewish settlers from early European exploration of the southern African coast to their significant contributions to South Africa’s social, economic, political, and cultural life. Through personal stories and historical insight, the series celebrates a resilient community whose pioneers and descendants helped shape the nation in fields ranging from business and politics to science, art, and activism.
